'''zhakara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudoaldosteronism|pseudoaldosteronism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-k-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudoaldosteronism|pseudoaldosteronism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhakara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhækæræth|zhækæræth]] || [[word:zhækæræj|zhækæræj]] || [[word:zhækæræsh|zhækæræsh]] || [[word:zhækæræ|zhækæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhakakarath|zhakakarath]] || [[word:zhakakaraj|zhakakaraj]] || [[word:zhakakarash|zhakakarash]] || [[word:zhakakara|zhakakara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhakarath|zhakarath]] || [[word:zhakaraj|zhakaraj]] || [[word:zhakarash|zhakarash]] || [[word:zhakara|zhakara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhakafrath|zhakafrath]] || [[word:zhakafraj|zhakafraj]] || [[word:zhakafrash|zhakafrash]] || [[word:zhakafraf|zhakafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhakaratha|zhakaratha]] || [[word:zhakaraja|zhakaraja]] || [[word:zhakarasha|zhakarasha]] || [[word:zhakaraka|zhakaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhakarath|zhakarath]] || [[word:zhakaraj|zhakaraj]] || [[word:zhakarash|zhakarash]] || [[word:zhakara|zhakara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhakarathal|zhakarathal]] || [[word:zhakarajal|zhakarajal]] || [[word:zhakarashal|zhakarashal]] || [[word:zhakarakal|zhakarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhakarathatha|zhakarathatha]] || [[word:zhakarajaja|zhakarajaja]] || [[word:zhakarashasha|zhakarashasha]] || [[word:zhakaraka|zhakaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhakarathan|zhakarathan]] || [[word:zhakarajan|zhakarajan]] || [[word:zhakarashan|zhakarashan]] || [[word:zhakarakan|zhakarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhakarathaoro|zhakarathaoro]] || [[word:zhakarajaoro|zhakarajaoro]] || [[word:zhakarashaoro|zhakarashaoro]] || [[word:zhakarakaoro|zhakarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
